summary: 0.6.59 is a small shuffle-default recovery slice: the ordering helper was already correct, but new player and preset records still defaulted shuffle on, which made image directories appear shuffled even when the operator expected plain natural order.
operatorSignals: Images always appeared shuffled even though the natural ordering helper should keep numbered files in sequence.
The shuffle toggle appeared checked on load, suggesting a default-state parity bug rather than a playlist-sort bug.
The current image scrub and navigation behavior was already good and should not be disturbed.
actionsTaken: Confirmed that directory-discovered media ordering still uses the shared natural sort helper.
Restored shuffle defaults to off for new standalone player records.
Restored shuffle defaults to off for new preset records when random state is absent.
nonGoals: No image scrub transport changes in this slice.
No movie joystick transport changes in this slice.
No slideshow, volume, or gaze work in this slice.
